Comments: The kick-off meeting covers the development strategy, timelines, scope, and tasks. Project leads are also introduced.
Deliverables required from the client to begin development. Key items to get started include: look & feel, copy, multimedia content, and branding.

Task: Multimedia / Photos and Videos on YouTube

Comments: Delivery of access, structure, and content related to the Products section of the website.

Task: Content (text and images) to upload Products

Comments: The client must provide access to the domain registrar and server.

Task: Gmail Access (for Google Analytics and Google Search Console)
Payment Gateway Access (PayPal, Stripe, Mercado Pago, etc.)

Comments: The sitemap is developed: a guide to define objectives, site structure, and page hierarchy, optimizing search engine indexing.
The sitemap requires client approval.

**Visual Mockup - Wireframe - Dummy PDF**  With the sitemap defined, a static dummy PDF or visual mockup is created to provide a clearer picture of the website design. Two pages are presented, showing text, graphic identity, colors, images, and more.
The client must approve the Dummy PDF.
Web development begins, presenting one or two sections for client approval.

Task: WordPress installation in the default language (English or Spanish)

Comments: The client must approve the initial web dummy before proceeding with the rest of the site.
The remaining pages and sections of the web dummy are developed.

Task: WP Admin Login and Registration Form

Comments: The client must approve the remaining web dummy.
Final adjustments to the web dummy after the Blog module is created, integrating minor changes before the approval stage.
Review and validation of the web dummy, including the Blog module, by the client to continue development.
Configuration and development of the Products section, leaving the structure ready to publish content in an organized, clear, and optimized manner.

Task: Taxonomy Creation: Categories, Variables, Tags, Brands
Design and development of Loop Item, Single, Archive, Shop Page, and Product Search Results
Design and development of My Account, Cart, and Checkout pages

Comments: Sample products are loaded to demonstrate how they work and serve as a style and structure reference, as stipulated in the agreement.
Final adjustments to the web dummy after the Products module is created, integrating minor changes before the approval stage.
Review and validation of the web dummy, including the Products module, by the client to continue development.
Brief session to explain how the client can independently create, edit, and publish products.
The client begins loading their own products following the defined structure and guidelines.
Preliminary version of the dummy site fully functional and ready for a general client review.
A review is conducted by the client and Sharpen.Studio.

Task: Review across multiple resolutions (including real mobile) and browsers

Comments: Final approval of the web dummy by the client to proceed with the site launch.
Remove temporary elements, media, pages, plugins, etc.
SEO - meta tags, copy, etc.

Comments: Email confirmation from the client that the previous site backup was generated successfully.

Migration Authorization - via Email by Client

Comments: Remaining SEO configuration tied to the live domain: sitemap and analytics platforms.
Final site review to validate functionality, links, and details before publishing.

Email Confirmation of Form Submission and Receipt on Website / By Client
